title: Senior Financial Analyst - Zerodha Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Zerodha Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zerodha Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zerodha Advisory Limited:
Zerodha Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha Advisory Limited!
